description: Corrections for fake factors for tau analysis

corrections.name: QCD_DR_SR_correction
corrections.description: Calculation of the DR_SR correction for QCD for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.description: pt_tautau

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainty from the correction measurement
